A Space to Heal & Connect

Events & Gatherings

The People Behind It

Our Story

The Detox Club was born from a simple belief: that a cup of something honest can change the shape of your day. Founded in the quiet lanes of Walkhu Galli, Lalitpur, we set out to create a space that feeds both the body and the creative spirit — a café, a co-working nook, and a gathering place for curious minds.

🌿
Priya Shrestha
Founder & Owner
A wellness advocate and entrepreneur, Priya launched The Detox Club after years of exploring plant-based living across Asia. She believes deeply in the power of intentional spaces — places where healing and connection happen over a shared meal.
🍳
Arjun Tamang
Head Chef
Arjun trained in functional nutrition and brings a chef's precision to every plate. His menus balance Nepali tradition with modern wellness science — always seasonal, always grounding, always delicious.
✍️
Sita Gurung
Manager & Community Lead
Sita keeps the space alive — from curating events to ensuring every guest feels at home. Her warmth is the invisible ingredient that makes The Detox Club more than a café; it's a community.
Collaborators & Partners
Local Organic Farms

Replace the placeholder config in the HTML with your actual Firebase project config.
Go to: Firebase Console → Project Settings → Your Apps → SDK setup → Config

authDomain: "YOUR_PROJECT.firebaseapp.com"
projectId: "YOUR_PROJECT_ID"
